Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Before everything[n]changed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, um... Didn't you see the message I left on the board? I have cram school today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I already left my stuff at the dorm, so there's no need for me to be there in person, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, sorry... Break's almost over. I gotta go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Tell everyone I said hi, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Yukari-chan's not coming after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Sanada-san said he'd be training at the gym, so I don't think he's coming either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Man, what is up with those two?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}This is the last day we have before the dorm closes down![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}With all our memories of this place, you'd think they'd wanna see it off together, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}It is what it is. Everyone deals with things in their own way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's up to each of us to choose our own path from here. We can't deny them that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Besides, I can hardly blame them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Things have only been getting busier... If I didn't have to reclaim these, I may not have made it here myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Guess it's finally time to say goodbye to our Evokers...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Kinda bums me out, but it's not like we got a use for 'em anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Lessee... Two, four... Wait, how many are there supposed to be?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I believe this is all of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}That's right... You had his for safekeeping...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}H-Hey, c'mon... Let's not get all down in the dumps about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I don't think... he would have wanted to see us like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Sorry. You're right... We've already said our goodbyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}There didn't seem to be anything wrong with him. It just looked like he fell asleep, didn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}He must have used up the rest of his power to protect us... at the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I don't think it's worth speculating on the reasons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}The one thing I feel certain of... is that he wouldn't have blamed any of us for what happened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Y'know, I'm glad to see you're still hangin' in there, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}It really seemed like you cared about him more than anything in the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I'm... somewhat surprised as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}It's possible I won't feel the full impact until I'm settled back in at the lab tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Huh? The lab? Are you planning on commuting from there next semester?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Aigis is returning to the lab for good. She... won't be enrolling as a third-year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Seriously!? Why? It's been fine this whole time, hasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}The decision was mine. I'm sorry I didn't mention it sooner...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I enjoy being with you all, but it's time for me to find my own way of life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Oh, but don't worry... You can come visit me whenever you wish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Think of it as a new beginning for her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Anyway... We seem to have gotten off track, but I didn't mean for this to be a sad occasion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}I've ordered top-quality sushi for us all. The same as last time, actually.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}We may not have the full team with us, but let's have a nice dinner here tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}You'll join in too, right, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Of course. I won't miss this chance to spend more time with you all.[n]{f 1 1}
